title: [Arc] Complete inout support for arcilator path (Fixes #9574)

features.name: inout wire port with combinational read
features.description: Code should include a module with an inout wire port that is read inside an always_comb block to drive an output

features.name: inout wire driven by continuous assign
features.description: Code should include a module where an inout wire port is driven by a continuous assign statement from an internal logic signal

features.name: inout wire sampled in sequential always_ff block
features.description: Code should include a module where an inout wire port is sampled into a flip-flop register on a positive clock edge inside an always_ff block

features.name: inout wire combinational feedback through inversion
features.description: Code should include a module where an inout wire port feeds a combinational always_comb block that computes the bitwise NOT of the inout value into a next-state logic variable

features.name: inout wire port combined read and write in same module
features.description: Code should include a module with a single inout wire port that is both read (combinationally and sequentially) and driven via assign in the same module, creating a bidirectional signal path
